blended.narrative: Lost Trail is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 3,071 ft. Looking ahead, 24 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.6" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.
Thursday: 7" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 5" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 6" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 2.4" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 5" over the past week. Current depth: 56".
